case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS JOYA JUAN RAMON

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOYA JUAN RAMON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOYA JUAN RAMON $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $940.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JOYA JUAN RAMON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.81 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT JOYA JUAN RAMON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
